title: Black Cat Cabaret
description: THE BLACK CAT CABARET is now SOLD OUT on the Fringe box office but there may be a last few remaining - please head to The Old Market website to check! Purchase additional tickets - https://www.theoldmarket.com/shows/the-black-cat-cabaret The BCC is returning to The Old Market to present a one-off feast of spectacular variety entertainment! Inspired in part by the dark and daring heyday of Parisian cabaret culture, yet with a timeless sensibility all of its own, the show features some of the finest cabaret, circus and burlesque performers on the international circuit. Join us!

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - East Anglia & South East May 17, 2025 Updated: August 9, 20
reviews.excerpt: A dizzying hour of cabaret entertainment. Electro-pop titan Laurie Black is a Brighton Fringe staple, her Bad Luck Cabaret an always-diverse mix of interesting art far from the complacency sometimes seen in this genre of tent-based vaudeville.
